title: PE invariants
summary: Aggregate import for the symbolic invariant, ambient-extension, Laplacian-recursion, divergence, and Pfaffian modules.

mathematicalContent.heading: What this entry point collects
mathematicalContent.body: This file introduces no Lean declarations. It makes five submodules available together: symbolic Riemannian invariants, straightenable ambient extensions, ambient-Laplacian recursion, natural divergences, and Pfaffian-like invariants.

mathematicalContent.heading: Reading status
mathematicalContent.body: Because the present file contains imports only, every mathematical definition and theorem must be checked in the named child module. The aggregate node itself proves nothing.

references.locator: Proposition 3.7, Proposition 3.10, Lemma 4.1, and Theorems 1.1/1.4 as applicable
references.note: Primary source for the invariant and divergence mechanisms represented by the imported child modules.

limitations: This is an import-only aggregate. The formulas summarize the subjects of its child modules and are not declarations or theorems in Invariants.lean itself.
